action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed successfully. 5 epochs took ~1043 seconds (~17 minutes). Dev EER reached 0.0015 after 5 epochs. Loss is still declining. Analysis: The model is working well on dev set (EER=0.0015). However, the test set uses codec-degraded audio (unseen attacks, channels, speakers) so dev EER may not reflect test performance. I need to submit eval to get the actual test EER. The training took ~17 min for 5 epochs, so I have budget for more training. Decision: Submit eval first to get baseline test EER, then continue training with more epochs.
